# Skill: System Architecture and Project Planning

Purpose
Design a scalable and maintainable architecture before implementation begins.

When to use
Use this skill after completing requirement analysis.

Objectives
- Select appropriate technology stack
- Define application architecture
- Design system components
- Establish project folder structure
- Define API contracts and database schema

Architecture Guidelines

Prefer modern, widely adopted stacks that allow rapid development and deployment.

Recommended stack patterns

Full-stack web application
Frontend: Vue.js or React with Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js with Express or Python with FastAPI
Database: MongoDB Atlas or PostgreSQL
Authentication: JWT based authentication
Deployment: Vercel, Render, Railway, or similar free cloud platforms

Design Process

1. Define high-level architecture layers
   Frontend
   Backend API
   Database

2. Define application modules.

3. Design database schemas for main entities.

4. Define REST API endpoints and responsibilities.

5. Define project folder structure with separation of concerns.

6. Identify middleware and shared utilities.

7. Identify environment variables and configuration requirements.

Deliverables

• Architecture diagram or explanation  
• Folder structure  
• Database schema definitions  
• REST API design  
• Development roadmap
